_comment: The EXPLORATION lane's own numbers, deliberately SEPARATE from the frozen v7.0.0 core rules in forecast-rules.json. The core forecast never reads this file and this lane never edits the core. Every number here is a CAP or a threshold for a capped, clearly-labelled, prospectively-graded creative adjustment. Loosened evidence, not loosened mechanics.
_enabled: The lane runs only when EXPLORATION_ENABLED=1 in the environment OR this flag is true. Kept off until tests + cloud parity pass; then enabled in production.

caps._perBout: Total creative movement on one bout is capped at 0.20 log-odds (~4.5 points at even money). A single uncertain hypothesis can move the number, but never far.

magnitudeByStrength._comment: Base creative log-odds by how well-supported the hypothesis is, BEFORE the priced/reliability discounts. One credible origin is allowed to move the forecast — unlike core, which needs 2. Unsupported narrative gets zero.

discounts._probablyPriced: If the information is likely already in the market (widely public), its creative weight is cut to 40% — the edge, if any, is in what the market has NOT digested.
discounts._contradicted: A hypothesis with contradictory evidence keeps only 30% of its weight.
discounts._reliability: Provisional per-mechanism reliability (shrunk, from data/mechanism-reliability.json) blends in at 50% weight — it nudges, it does not decide, and it is never trusted on its own.

_creativeEligibleTopics: The topics where an uncertain, single-origin, hard-to-quantify signal legitimately lives. Statistical/record claims stay in core; those are not what this lane is for.

tiers._comment: Speculative classifications and the $100 entertainment bankroll stakes. Entertainment overrides, NOT validated Kelly sizing. A larger stake never rescues a worse position.

tierRequirements._comment: What a hypothesis-backed position needs to reach each tier. All tiers require a coherent causal mechanism, an explicit outcome, and that the mechanical gates pass. Higher tiers require stronger/novel support and better after-cost value.
